title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird founded Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform for AI tools, raising $26M by betting on ads rather than subscriptions. He argues that the real bottleneck for AI agents is not technology but human trust adoption, and that ads will be more viable than subscriptions for sustaining AI applications.
